title: AI Chatbot Generator
shortDescription: A SaaS-based AI chatbot generator that creates customizable chatbots and provides embeddable script tags for seamless website integration.
whatItSolves: Eliminates the need for businesses to build chatbots from scratch by allowing them to generate and deploy AI-powered chatbots instantly using their own knowledge base.
fullDescription: Developed a full-stack AI chatbot generator platform where users can create custom chatbots by providing business details or knowledge base content. The system processes this data and generates a unique embeddable JavaScript script tag that users can integrate into any website. Once embedded, the chatbot can interact with visitors in real-time, providing automated responses based on the trained data. The platform follows a SaaS model with scalable backend architecture and a modern UI for smooth user experience.

skillsUsed.Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST API Development, Script Generation Logic

title: AI Notes Generator
shortDescription: An AI-powered notes generator platform with a credit-based usage system, enabling users to generate structured notes instantly.
whatItSolves: Helps students and professionals quickly generate high-quality notes without spending hours researching and writing, while controlling API usage through a credit-based system.
fullDescription: Built a full-stack AI notes generation platform inspired by ChatGPT, where users can input topics or prompts and receive well-structured, AI-generated notes in real-time. Implemented a credit-based system to manage and limit usage, simulating real-world SaaS monetization models. The platform includes secure authentication, dynamic prompt handling, and a responsive UI for smooth interaction. Designed to be scalable and efficient with optimized API usage.

skillsUsed.Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Credit System Logic

title: Portfolio v1
shortDescription: My previous developer portfolio built with plain HTML, CSS, and JS.
whatItSolves: Acted as my first digital footprint, establishing my online presence and serving as a central hub for prospective clients and employers before scaling to this newer build.
fullDescription: The first version of my personal portfolio. It showcases static website building skills utilizing vanilla CSS and JS animations. While simple, it maintains a clean layout and serves as a testament to my growth.
